title: Spain rejects White House claim it agreed to cooperate with U.S. forces amid Iran war
summary_full: The White House says Spain will now cooperate with the U.S. militarily over the Iran conflict. Madrid swiftly rejected this claim.
summary_public: The White House says Spain will now cooperate with the U.S. militarily over the Iran conflict. Madrid swiftly rejected this claim.

ES.label: negative
ES.evidence: Spain rejects White House claim it agreed to cooperate
